answers: Start violin: get proper sized instrument, learn to hold bow correctly, and practice open strings first. Take lessons if possible.
Violin is one of the hardest instruments — intonation (no frets) is challenging. Expect scratchy sounds for first few weeks.
Tips: practice scales daily, use a tuner, focus on bow hold and pressure, and be patient — it takes months to sound decent.
Violin bajano: teacher hole best, proper posture shikho, open string diye shuru koro, ar daily practice essential.
